mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mt_meter_match (id, archive_id, meter_type, create_by, create_time) VALUES (${@com.baomidou.mybatisplus.core.toolkit.IdWorker@getId()}, #{entity.id}, '31', #{entity.createBy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.code, a.name, a.specification, a.model, a.type, a.is_action, a.install_site, a.seq, a.is_enabled FROM mt_tc_valve a INNER JOIN mt_meter_match m ON a.id = m.archive_id WHERE m.meter_type = '31'
